api_semantics.scope: ShapeFix_Edge operators are evaluated in memory only and never written back to production geometry by this report.
api_semantics.recovered_definition: An attempt is recovered only when PCurve presence, same-parameter, curve-3D-with-PCurve, and vertex-tolerance checks all pass.

limitations: This report does not write a repaired STEP file and does not change production defaults.
It does not run Gmsh, SU2_CFD, or any CL/convergence acceptance gate.
ShapeFix operation return values are diagnostic only; recovery is defined by the post-operation geometry checks.
